creator: bergerkos@yahoo.co.uk
text: Sorry for confusion! In my initial message I wrote that I redirect this web-camera to a Windows 10 Pro "host", though it is meant to read, of course, "Windows 10 Pro GUEST in bhyve". So it is Windows 10 side and FreeBSD side. I haven't tried, though, how well (whether or not) this whole thing works in Linux.
